---
title: "Support Materials"
subtitle: "Downloadable resources"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## How to Access
Click on any document link below to download or view. Materials are organised by type and will be updated throughout the academic year.
:::

## Lecture Slides & Handouts {#lectures}

Original lecture slide decks and annotated handouts from the taught sessions.

::: {.lecture-card}

| Document | Description | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [Cortisol Lecture Slides](docs/lectures/cortisol-lecture-slides.pdf) | Complete lecture covering physiology through drug discovery | PDF |

:::

## Recommended Reading {#reading}

Key papers, reviews, and textbook chapters supporting this unit.

::: {.callout-note}
Reading materials will be added here as they become available.
:::

## Past Exam Papers & Assessments {#exams}

Previous examination papers and example assessment questions for revision purposes.

::: {.lecture-card}

| Document | Description | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [2022–23 Practice Questions](docs/lectures/2022-23-practice-questions.docx) | Practice questions for revision | DOCX |

:::

## Practical & Laboratory Guides {#practicals}

Supporting materials for practical sessions and laboratory work.

::: {.callout-note}
Practical guides will be added here as they become available.
:::

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Can't Find What You Need?
All materials are also available on the [NTU NOW Learning Room](https://now.ntu.ac.uk/d2l/le/lessons/1120887/units/13808668) (Unit 5). Contact Dr Paul-Clark if you have difficulty accessing any resources.
:::

---

## Adding Your Own Files

::: {.callout-warning collapse="true"}
## For the module leader: How to update this page

To add your support documents from your local machine:

**Step 1:** Copy files from your local folder into the appropriate `docs/` subfolder:

```bash
# From your local machine
# Lectures
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/*.pdf docs/lectures/

# Reading materials  
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/reading/*.pdf docs/reading/

# Past exams
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/exams/*.pdf docs/exams/

# Practical guides
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/practicals/*.pdf docs/practicals/
```

**Step 2:** Update the table entries above to match your actual filenames.

**Step 3:** Rebuild and deploy:

```bash
quarto render
git add -A
git commit -m "Added support materials"
git push
```

The site will automatically rebuild on GitHub Pages.

**File naming convention:** Use descriptive names without spaces, e.g., `Cortisol_Full_Lecture.pdf`, `Rhen_Cidlowski_2005.pdf`
:::
